blocks.content: You should've pushed through! The more trials, the smaller the error!

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: With what ammo? Following your strategy, we'd have bet the house deeds next!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: See! That's it! Nothing in the world can be consumed infinitely! Energy's the same!

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Where did that come from?!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hahaha!
Shirone burst out laughing.
Everyone chasing their dreams was the same.
Success and failure were secondary.
Even if the world pointed fingers, even if they mocked him as an idealist who couldn't support a family—someone had to do it.
That was how humanity had progressed this far.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay if it's not me. I don't mind… being fertilizer for someone else.
Shirone stopped overthinking.
Grateful for all the luck that had shaped him, he'd just keep moving forward.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Shirone, why are you grinning like an idiot? Eat something weird?
Shirone shook his head without answering.
Steel himself, he took a step forward.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm back, guys.
Two days remained until his suspension ended.
Nade and Iruki arrived at the fourth training ground at dawn, waiting for Shirone.
Though early, summer made the surroundings bright.
The two yawned repeatedly, staring at the entrance.
Nade rubbed his sleepy face.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Ugh, what? Dragging us out this early.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: He said he had something to show us.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: What could it be? After all we've seen, I'm already amazed.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Who knows? Maybe he got a tattoo on his dick.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Pfft—hahaha!
Imagining it, Nade roared with laughter.
Just then, Shirone entered the training ground.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh? You're here already. Why's Nade like that?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Dunno. Probably a pervert thing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hahaha! A tattoo! There?! Hahaha!
Uneasy, Shirone didn't pry.
They were surely joking around as usual.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anyway, let's begin. I'm eager to show you.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Show us what? The tattoo? Hahaha!
Iruki sighed.
Stop. It's not funny anymore.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: So, why'd you call us here? What's this thing you want to show?
Wait.
I'll do it now.
Shirone walked to the center of the training ground and raised his hand toward a rocky hill.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: What? Photon output? Did you increase it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wait.
Shirone cast the Photon Cannon.
Boom!
A white flash streaked past Nade and Iruki.
The rock shattered with a dull roar.
The previously bored duo's eyes widened.
Their jaws nearly hit the ground.
